title: AI にロット追跡を作らせてみた — 67枚目で初めて「越えられない穴」が出た（やってみた #67）
readmeTitle: ロット追跡/トレーサビリティ（製造・ロット系譜DAG/リコール範囲特定/入出庫工程履歴層）
summary: 製造の4枚目は食品工場のトレーサビリティ。不良ロットが出たとき、どの原材料から作られ、どこへ出荷されたかを辿ってリコール範囲を特定する画面。**67枚やってきて、初めて「部品では描けない」構造に当たった**回。

article.markdown:
# AI にロット追跡を作らせてみた — 67枚目で初めて「越えられない穴」が出た（やってみた #67）

> **やってみたシリーズ**: 自作のデザインシステム `@gunjo/ui`（[群青](https://gunjo.jp)）を、文脈ゼロの cold な AI に実 UI で作らせる連載。**製造4枚目**——**ロット追跡 / トレーサビリティ**（ロット系譜 × リコール範囲特定 × 入出庫工程履歴 × 出荷先追跡）。

製造の4枚目は食品工場のトレーサビリティ。不良ロットが出たとき、どの原材料から作られ、どこへ出荷されたかを辿ってリコール範囲を特定する画面。**67枚やってきて、初めて「部品では描けない」構造に当たった**回。

## 結果 — 4/5

`tsc`/`build` 緑・console 0・375px（横スクロール0）・ロット概要・受払照合・**双方向系譜ツリー**・リコール範囲確定（ライブ集計）・工程監査証跡・出荷先テーブル・h1 1個。**今回 src 修正はゼロ**——kit が85%を摩擦なく賄い、残り15%＝系譜の核が初の大穴。

## 今回の主役（の不在）— ロット系譜は DAG なのに、ツリーしか無い

トレーサビリティの心臓は**ロット系譜**。これは本質的に **DAG（有向非巡回グラフ）**だ：1つの原材料ロットが複数の製品ロットに入り、1つの製品ロットが複数の原材料ロットを消費する（**多親かつ多子**）。だが kit の階層プリミティブは `TreeView`（厳密な単親ツリー）だけ:

> **No DAG / node-link / graph component — the single biggest gap.** Lot genealogy is fundamentally a DAG. The only hierarchy primitive is `TreeView`, a strict single-parent tree. Workaround: split the DAG into two directional trees (上流/下流) and annotate cross-links in **plain text** (`⚠ 共有ロット — RM-CONC-2405-23 にも投入`) because the tree literally cannot draw the cross-link. **The structure the user most needs to see — shared-lot fan-in/fan-out, which drives recall blast radius — is exactly what the component can't express.**

つまり**リコールの影響範囲を決める「共有ロットの分岐・合流」が、ツリーでは描けない**。これは [#281](https://github.com/uixhero/gunjo/issues/281) に起票。グラフ/node-link は layout・エッジ配線・グラフ走査の a11y を伴う**大型 primitive** なので、3回ルールで（トレーサビリティ/組織図/依存グラフ/BOM で再出現したら）build する。1回目は正直に起票して見送り。

## それでも業界越えはまた効いた

部品単体の被覆率は高く、**他業界で育てた部品がまた骨格そのまま効いた**:

> - **`SafetyBanner`**（臨床のアレルギー/禁忌警告用）→ **QA リコール警告に perfectly**。`requireAck`＋controlled acknowledged が「QA 責任者がリコール範囲を承認してからサインオフ」に1:1。"best single component on the screen, 摩擦ゼロ"。
> - **`Meter direction="higher-is-better"+target`**（#256・2回前に land）→ **受払照合バーに自力採用**（受領 vs 出荷+保留+在庫残＝100%で success）。#65/#66/#67 と**3回連続、野生で効き続けてる**。
> - **`Timeline`**（variant＋marker）→ 入庫/工程投入/製造/検査/出庫の監査証跡・**`DistributionBar`** → 出荷済/保留/在庫残の内訳・**`DataTable.renderCard`** → 375px で出荷先がカード崩し。

医療/物流/会計で育てた部品が、製造トレーサビリティでもそのまま効いた。

## 起票だけ（3回ルールで育てる）

- 🔴 **系譜グラフ/DAG/node-link**（多親系譜・[#281](https://github.com/uixhero/gunjo/issues/281)・1回目・大型）。
- 🟡 **RouteStops が配送ドメイン固定が2回目**（#64 工程ルート＋#67 系譜/出荷チェーン・[#282](https://github.com/uixhero/gunjo/issues/282)）。status enum 固定・配送ラベル baked・ETA/遅延の時間モデル固定で「消費/製造/検査」を表せない。汎用 status＋任意 time で build（あと1回）。
- 🟡 **TreeView がラベルクリックで toggle と select 両方発火**（ノード詳細を開く `onNodeActivate` が無い・[#283](https://github.com/uixhero/gunjo/issues/283)）。
- 🟡 **MetadataList が値を hard truncate**（長い製造ライン名が wrap せず clip・[#284](https://github.com/uixhero/gunjo/issues/284)）。
- 🟡 **選択可能リスト** がまた必要（リコール範囲確定＝checkbox＋status＋ライブ集計・リコール/返品/一括承認で再出現・[#135](https://github.com/uixhero/gunjo/issues/135) に追記）。

## 学び — 「kit が持ちこたえた」も「初の大穴」も、両方が正直なデータ

67枚目で初めて、**部品の合成では表現しきれない構造**（多親 DAG）に当たった。これは負けじゃなく、cold-test の狙いそのもの——「実業務をやらせると、どこで足りなくなるか」が炙り出される。一方で SafetyBanner（臨床）や Meter higher-is-better（#256）がまた別業界で骨格そのまま効き、85%は摩擦ゼロ。**「持ちこたえた範囲」と「初めて足りなかった核」を同じ精度で記録する**のが、次に何を作るべきかを決める材料になる。系譜グラフは大きいので急がず、3回ルールで再出現を待って build する。

## 次回予告（やってみた #68）
- **製造をもう1枚**（生産計画/負荷山積み or 出荷/在庫引当）で5枚目、or 別業界へ pivot（教育/公共）。系譜グラフ#281・RouteStops汎用化#282 の再出現も観測。

## 試す
- **[gunjo.jp](https://gunjo.jp)** ／ npm `@gunjo/ui` ／ **[GitHub](https://github.com/uixhero/gunjo)**
- 前回まで: [#1](#)〜[#66](#)
- **GunjoUI by [UIXHERO](https://www.uixhero.com)**

まだ alpha。67枚目で初めて部品では描けない構造（多親DAGの系譜）に当たり、それでも SafetyBanner/Meter がまた業界を越えた回。

code.source:
/**
 * Domain data for the ロット追跡 / トレーサビリティ screen.
 * Manufacturing traceability — a finished product lot, its upstream material
 * lots (consumed INTO it) and downstream lots / shipments (came OUT of it).
 *
 * This is hand-authored mock data shaped like a real MES/QMS export.
 */

export type LotStatus = "in-stock" | "shipped" | "hold" | "recall"

export interface LotStatusMeta {
    label: string
    /** Badge variant — never the ONLY signal; pair with the icon glyph. */
    badge: "secondary" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "destructive" | "outline"
    /** Short code shown in text so status is legible without colour. */
    code: string
}

export const LOT_STATUS: Record<LotStatus, LotStatusMeta> = {
    "in-stock": { label: "在庫", badge: "secondary", code: "STOCK" },
    shipped: { label: "出荷済", badge: "info", code: "SHIPPED" },
    hold: { label: "保留", badge: "warning", code: "HOLD" },
    recall: { label: "リコール対象", badge: "destructive", code: "RECALL" },
}

/** The subject lot — the product lot under investigation. */
export const subjectLot = {
    lotNo: "FG-2406-0815",
    productName: "オレンジジュース 1L 紙パック",
    productCode: "JV-ORG-1000",
    manufacturedAt: "2026-06-15",
    bestBefore: "2026-12-14",
    line: "第2充填ライン (L2)",
    status: "recall" as LotStatus,
    /** Quantity reconciliation (units). */
    producedQty: 12_000,
    shippedQty: 9_400,
    remainingQty: 1_850,
    holdQty: 750,
    unit: "本",
    qaManager: "佐藤 健一",
}

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *
 * Genealogy — a DAG flattened into two directional trees.
 * upstream  = 上流 (material lots consumed INTO this lot)
 * downstream = 下流 (product lots / shipments produced OUT of this lot)
 * ------------------------------------------------------------------ */

export interface GenealogyNode {
    id: string
    /** Lot number. */
    lotNo: string
    /** What it is. */
    name: string
    /** material | intermediate | product | shipment */
    kind: "material" | "intermediate" | "product" | "shipment"
    /** Supplier / customer / line. */
    party?: string
    qty?: string
    date?: string
    status: LotStatus
    /**
     * Marks a node that is also reachable by another path in the real DAG —
     * the same material lot or product lot appears under more than one parent.
     * The strict tree can't express that, so we annotate it. (friction)
     */
    sharedWith?: string
    children?: GenealogyNode[]
}

/** 上流: raw-material & component lots that went INTO FG-2406-0815. */
export const upstream: GenealogyNode[] = [
    {
        id: "u-concentrate",
        lotNo: "RM-CONC-2405-22",
        name: "オレンジ濃縮果汁",
        kind: "material",
        party: "サンフルーツ商事",
        qty: "1,200 kg",
        date: "2026-05-28 入荷",
        status: "recall",
        children: [
            {
                id: "u-orange-a",
                lotNo: "SUP-BRZ-0521",
                name: "ブラジル産オレンジ (一次原料)",
                kind: "material",
                party: "Citrus Brasil S.A.",
                qty: "8,400 kg",
                date: "2026-05-21 仕入",
                status: "recall",
                sharedWith: "RM-CONC-2405-23 にも投入",
            },
            {
                id: "u-orange-b",
                lotNo: "SUP-SPN-0518",
                name: "スペイン産オレンジ (補完原料)",
                kind: "material",
                party: "Naranjas del Sur",
                qty: "2,100 kg",
                date: "2026-05-18 仕入",
                status: "in-stock",
            },
        ],
    },
    {
        id: "u-water",
        lotNo: "RM-WTR-2406-03",
        name: "精製水",
        kind: "material",
        party: "自社 浄水設備",
        qty: "7,800 L",
        date: "2026-06-14 製造",
        status: "in-stock",
    },
    {
        id: "u-pack",
        lotNo: "RM-PAK-2405-77",
        name: "紙パック資材 1L",
        kind: "material",
        party: "東邦パッケージ",
        qty: "13,000 枚",
        date: "2026-05-30 入荷",
        status: "in-stock",
        children: [
            {
                id: "u-cap",
                lotNo: "RM-CAP-2405-12",
                name: "スクリューキャップ",
                kind: "material",
                party: "東邦パッケージ",
                qty: "13,000 個",
                date: "2026-05-30 入荷",
                status: "in-stock",
            },
        ],
    },
]

/** 下流: lots / shipments produced OUT of FG-2406-0815. */
export const downstream: GenealogyNode[] = [
    {
        id: "d-pallet-a",
        lotNo: "PAL-2406-0815-A",
        name: "出荷パレット A (4,800本)",
        kind: "intermediate",
        party: "第2倉庫",
        qty: "4,800 本",
        date: "2026-06-16 梱包",
        status: "shipped",
        children: [
            {
                id: "d-ship-tokyo",
                lotNo: "SHP-2406-1102",
                name: "首都圏物流センター 向け出荷",
                kind: "shipment",
                party: "関東フーズ流通",
                qty: "4,800 本",
                date: "2026-06-17 出荷",
                status: "shipped",
            },
        ],
    },
    {
        id: "d-pallet-b",
        lotNo: "PAL-2406-0815-B",
        name: "出荷パレット B (4,600本)",
        kind: "intermediate",
        party: "第2倉庫",
        qty: "4,600 本",
        date: "2026-06-16 梱包",
        status: "shipped",
        children: [
            {
                id: "d-ship-osaka",
                lotNo: "SHP-2406-1147",
                name: "関西物流センター 向け出荷",
                kind: "shipment",
                party: "近畿リテール",
                qty: "3,000 本",
                date: "2026-06-18 出荷",
                status: "shipped",
            },
            {
                id: "d-ship-nagoya",
                lotNo: "SHP-2406-1150",
                name: "中部DC 向け出荷",
                kind: "shipment",
                party: "中部物流サービス",
                qty: "1,600 本",
                date: "2026-06-18 出荷",
                status: "recall",
                sharedWith: "ほかロットと混載",
            },
        ],
    },
    {
        id: "d-hold",
        lotNo: "HLD-2406-0815",
        name: "保留在庫 (出荷停止)",
        kind: "intermediate",
        party: "第2倉庫 隔離エリア",
        qty: "750 本",
        date: "2026-06-19 保留",
        status: "hold",
    },
]

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *
 * Recall scope — forward impact of treating the subject lot as suspect.
 * ------------------------------------------------------------------ */

export interface RecallTarget {
    id: string
    /** Downstream lot / shipment. */
    lotNo: string
    /** Distributor / customer. */
    party: string
    /** Region. */
    region: string
    qty: number
    /** affected = within recall scope; clear = traced and exonerated. */
    impact: "affected" | "clear" | "investigating"
}

export const recallTargets: RecallTarget[] = [
    { id: "rt-1", lotNo: "SHP-2406-1102", party: "関東フーズ流通", region: "首都圏", qty: 4_800, impact: "affected" },
    { id: "rt-2", lotNo: "SHP-2406-1147", party: "近畿リテール", region: "関西", qty: 3_000, impact: "affected" },
    { id: "rt-3", lotNo: "SHP-2406-1150", party: "中部物流サービス", region: "中部", qty: 1_600, impact: "investigating" },
    { id: "rt-4", lotNo: "HLD-2406-0815", party: "自社 隔離在庫", region: "工場内", qty: 750, impact: "affected" },
    { id: "rt-5", lotNo: "STK-2406-0815", party: "自社 在庫", region: "工場内", qty: 1_100, impact: "clear" },
]

export const recallImpactMeta: Record<
    RecallTarget["impact"],
    { label: string; badge: "destructive" | "success" | "warning"; code: string }
> = {
    affected: { label: "リコール対象", badge: "destructive", code: "対象" },
    investigating: { label: "調査中", badge: "warning", code: "調査" },
    clear: { label: "対象外 (確認済)", badge: "success", code: "対象外" },
}

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *
 * 入出庫 / 工程履歴 — time-ordered audit trail.
 * ------------------------------------------------------------------ */

export type HistoryKind = "received" | "consumed" | "produced" | "inspected" | "held" | "shipped"

export interface HistoryEvent {
    id: string
    kind: HistoryKind
    title: string
    detail: string
    actor: string
    at: string
    /** Quantity delta (units of the subject lot, when applicable). */
    qty?: string
}

export const history: HistoryEvent[] = [
    {
        id: "h-1",
        kind: "received",
        title: "原料受入 — オレンジ濃縮果汁",
        detail: "RM-CONC-2405-22 を1,200kg受入。受入検査 合格。",
        actor: "受入担当 / 田中",
        at: "2026-06-14 08:12",
        qty: "+1,200 kg",
    },
    {
        id: "h-2",
        kind: "consumed",
        title: "工程投入 — 調合",
        detail: "濃縮果汁・精製水を第2調合タンクへ投入。配合比 1:6.5。",
        actor: "調合 / 鈴木",
        at: "2026-06-15 09:40",
        qty: "−1,200 kg 原料",
    },
    {
        id: "h-3",
        kind: "produced",
        title: "充填・製造完了 — FG-2406-0815",
        detail: "第2充填ライン(L2)で1Lパックを充填。製造数量を計上。",
        actor: "ライン長 / 高橋",
        at: "2026-06-15 16:55",
        qty: "+12,000 本",
    },
    {
        id: "h-4",
        kind: "inspected",
        title: "出荷判定検査 — 合格",
        detail: "微生物・糖度・pH 規格内。官能検査 合格。出荷可ステータスへ。",
        actor: "品質保証 / 佐藤",
        at: "2026-06-16 10:20",
    },
    {
        id: "h-5",
        kind: "shipped",
        title: "出荷 — 首都圏物流センター",
        detail: "SHP-2406-1102 として4,800本を出荷。",
        actor: "出荷担当 / 伊藤",
        at: "2026-06-17 07:30",
        qty: "−4,800 本",
    },
    {
        id: "h-6",
        kind: "shipped",
        title: "出荷 — 関西 / 中部",
        detail: "SHP-2406-1147 (3,000本) / SHP-2406-1150 (1,600本) を出荷。",
        actor: "出荷担当 / 伊藤",
        at: "2026-06-18 07:15",
        qty: "−4,600 本",
    },
    {
        id: "h-7",
        kind: "held",
        title: "出荷保留 — 原料異常の疑い",
        detail:
            "上流ロット SUP-BRZ-0521 に残留農薬の疑い。未出荷分750本を隔離・出荷停止。",
        actor: "品質保証 / 佐藤",
        at: "2026-06-19 14:02",
        qty: "750 本 保留",
    },
]

export const historyKindMeta: Record<
    HistoryKind,
    { label: string; variant: "default" | "muted" | "success" | "warning" | "destructive" | "info" }
> = {
    received: { label: "入庫", variant: "info" },
    consumed: { label: "工程投入", variant: "default" },
    produced: { label: "製造", variant: "success" },
    inspected: { label: "検査", variant: "success" },
    held: { label: "保留", variant: "warning" },
    shipped: { label: "出庫", variant: "destructive" },
}

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *
 * 出荷先一覧 — shipment / destination table.
 * ------------------------------------------------------------------ */

export type DeliveryStatus = "delivered" | "in-transit" | "recalled" | "stopped"

export interface ShipmentRow {
    id: string
    shipmentNo: string
    distributor: string
    region: string
    qty: number
    shipDate: string
    delivery: DeliveryStatus
}

export const shipments: ShipmentRow[] = [
    {
        id: "s-1",
        shipmentNo: "SHP-2406-1102",
        distributor: "関東フーズ流通",
        region: "首都圏",
        qty: 4_800,
        shipDate: "2026-06-17",
        delivery: "delivered",
    },
    {
        id: "s-2",
        shipmentNo: "SHP-2406-1147",
        distributor: "近畿リテール",
        region: "関西",
        qty: 3_000,
        shipDate: "2026-06-18",
        delivery: "recalled",
    },
    {
        id: "s-3",
        shipmentNo: "SHP-2406-1150",
        distributor: "中部物流サービス",
        region: "中部",
        qty: 1_600,
        shipDate: "2026-06-18",
        delivery: "in-transit",
    },
    {
        id: "s-4",
        shipmentNo: "SHP-2406-1166",
        distributor: "東北流通センター",
        region: "東北",
        qty: 900,
        shipDate: "2026-06-19",
        delivery: "stopped",
    },
]

export const deliveryMeta: Record<
    DeliveryStatus,
    { label: string; badge: "secondary" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "destructive"; code: string }
> = {
    delivered: { label: "納品済", badge: "success", code: "OK" },
    "in-transit": { label: "配送中", badge: "info", code: "TRANSIT" },
    recalled: { label: "回収中", badge: "destructive", code: "RECALL" },
    stopped: { label: "出荷停止", badge: "warning", code: "STOP" },
}

"use client" import * as React from "react" import { IconAlertTriangle, IconArrowDownRight, IconArrowUpRight, IconBuildingWarehouse, IconCheck, IconChecks, IconClipboardCheck, IconClockHour4, IconCircleCheck, IconCircleDot, IconFileExport, IconFlask, IconPackageExport, IconPackageImport, IconShieldCheck, IconTruckDelivery, } from "@tabler/icons-react" import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle, Badge, Button, Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, Checkbox, DataTable, DistributionBar, Icon, MetadataList, Meter, SafetyBanner, Separator, Statistic, Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger, Timeline, TimelineDescription, TimelineItem, TimelineTime, TimelineTitle, type ColumnDef, } from "@gunjo/ui" import { GenealogyTree } from "./GenealogyTree" import { LOT_STATUS, deliveryMeta, downstream, history, historyKindMeta, recallImpactMeta, recallTargets, shipments, subjectLot, upstream, type RecallTarget, type ShipmentRow, } from "./data" const numberFmt = new Intl.NumberFormat("ja-JP") const HISTORY_ICON = { received: IconPackageImport, consumed: IconFlask, produced: IconBuildingWarehouse, inspected: IconClipboardCheck, held: IconClockHour4, shipped: IconPackageExport, } as const export default function LotTraceability() { const status = LOT_STATUS[subjectLot.status] /* Recall scope — controlled confirmation.
